title: cotylelobium lewisianum
intro: Cotylelobium lewisianum, also known as the Lewisian ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Dichapetalaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cotylelobium lewisianum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Cotylelobium lewisianum can be prepared as a herbal remedy through decoction, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
